title: NASA Sun Science
description: A NASA source card about the Sun, space weather, solar energy, and heliophysics.
license: Public Domain / NASA Media Usage Guidelines

pages.text: NASA Sun resources introduce the star at the center of our solar system, including solar activity, magnetic fields, space weather, and effects on Earth.
Use this source when students connect energy, magnetism, atmosphere, satellites, auroras, and real-world technology systems.
NASA materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some images, partner resources, and logos have separate usage rules. Check item-level rights.
